title: How Germany Misjudged Trump’s Anger on Iran
summary_full: After Chancellor Friedrich Merz upset President Trump with criticism of the war, he offered no public sign he believed Mr. Trump’s threats to pull troops were serious.
summary_public: After Chancellor Friedrich Merz upset President Trump with criticism of the war, he offered no public sign he believed Mr. Trump’s threats to pull troops were serious.

DE.label: negative
DE.evidence: Germany Misjudged Trump’s Anger on Iran
